name: Hindsight Keep-Alive + Health Monitor
description: Every 30min: ping /health (prevent sleep) + check memory count via /stats. If bank empty (post-restart), wait for server-side restore then trigger reseed.
prompt:
Run this health check script silently and report only the key results:

python3 ~/.claude/scripts/hindsight-health-check.py

Report: health status, memory count, and whether reseed was triggered.
